samples:
I wonder if I'll ever learn to swim
If it is right then you should try
If the tides of war will bring the rain
Then let it rain until we drown


And when I dig through the dirt and blood
When I search for gold that is mine
And if there comes a time when I break this spell
Then leave my skin on the wall and die!


All I have seen is all that matters not
All I have known is what brings me low


Straight from the pit
Into the fire
Diggin' out your eyes and swallowing them whole
Burn, burn, burn




Life can end with just one blow
There's hell on earth but so much more below
Ride into battle or stand alone
But don't get caught in no crossfire at all


Roll in the dirt and blood
Search for gold that is mine
And if there comes a time when I break this spell
Then leave my skin on the wall and die!


Straight from the pit
Into the fire
Diggin' out your eyes and swallowing them whole
Burn, burn, burn

I guess that's the thing
That I hate about this land
And when you try to dig me out from underground
You might hurt my feelings
But it won't stop me from trying


Letting loose the reins
Of all your negative thoughts
Throw 'em out of the stable door
Into the dry and bright light
The place where you belong
Surrounding mountains, ocean floor
We are all connected as one
With every thought we think


Holding hands with you
As we walk through this life
A shelter for the storm
Our love shines as bright
Brighter than stars themselves
Guide us along these dark roads

Bringing forth a vision
Revealing beauty's light
Radiant wings of grace surround
All beings that fly free
Leave this world behind
Fly among them in blue sky
Circle round me loving ones
Save me from myself again

I wish I could erase the pain
Just cut through it
Please bury it six feet down

Straight down the line, you know what I want
I came to fight with this rage in my heart
The enemy is dead and buried underground
He doesn't get out of his grave anymore


Life after life, as long as I breathe
Taking a breath from another lifetime
Gone away forever more, leaving me empty
I wonder if I could ever fill your shoes again


Straight down the line, you know what I want
My soul is crying out for vengeance
The enemy is dead and buried underground
He doesn't get out of his grave anymore


Life after life, as long as I breathe
Taking a breath from another lifetime
Gone away forever more, leaving me empty
I wonder if I could ever fill your shoes again

Straight down the line, you know what I want
My soul is crying out for vengeance
The enemy is dead and buried underground
He doesn't get out of his grave anymore


Life after life, as long as I breathe
Taking a breath from another lifetime
Gone away forever more, leaving me empty
I wonder if I could ever fill your shoes again

I don't think I want to hear your voice anymore
This pressure on my brain is making it hard to think
The damage that you caused, now your time has come
You had a plan for the future and now it's gone


And when you get too close
To me I feel so small
I try to tell myself to please yourself instead of me


I can see all this gold shining bright on the inside
It makes me wonder how many lives did it destroy?
Can you hear all these voices coming from inside your head?
Oh god damn, you've got all this money but no peace at all


Now it's time to leave you alone
Get out while we can still fight
Leave your fucking head space alone
It's killing us as we fight




And when you get too close
To me I feel so small
I try to tell myself to please yourself instead of me
I will find my way back home again
I will dig until the stone gives way

Straight down the line
You're gonna get caught up in the whirlwind
Don't move, you can't escape
Yeah, we got your name right here


Save a smile for me
Oh my darling one
Save a smile for me
I think it will help me now


Go to work on that
Breakthrough the wall that surrounds us
Get out and run away from me
And leave me all alone

It's time to get up and fight
The battle for my life
